title: phyllanthus cryptophilus
intro: Phyllanthus cryptophilus, also known as the Guinea goldeneye or golden-eyed tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of liver and kidney diseases due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Phyllanthus cryptophilus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Phyllanthus cryptophilus include the leaves and roots being used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
